name: Strun
description: The Strun is a standard shotgun. Reliable, versatile and deadly.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
MK1-Strun
Strun
Strun Prime
Strun Wraith

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reloading an extra bullet into the Strun if you fired 5 or more shots before the reload.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed all variants of the Strun playing animation and sound FX on reload but not adding ammo to magazine, causing it to get stuck in a reloading loop.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ammo not being consumed when reloading the Strun and Transferring to the Operator simultaneously.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the MK-1 Kunai and MK-1 Strun not being purchasable in the Market when completing Vor’s Prize.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Strun & Strun Wraith reload sounds not playing properly.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Strun weapons not reloading while bullet jumping.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not being able to trade the Dera Vandal Blueprint, Karak Wraith Blueprint, Strun Wraith Blueprint, Snipetron Vandal Blueprint/Barrel and Sheev Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Reduced the damage of the Strun Wraith in Conclave.
Adjusted the audio FX on the Strun’s reload.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of the MK1-Strun in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.changes: Strun series damage has been increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.1: Operation Shadow Debt.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Karak Wraith Barrel improperly being named as the Strun Wraith Barrel.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Strun Wraith being unable to equip the Strun Conclave Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage of Strun series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Increased the damage of the Strun series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some elements of Parkour 2.0 interfering with reload on the Strun and Strun Wraith.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Strun not being able to be reloaded until all shells are fired when using reload speed Mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Strun, Machete, Cleaver has been given the PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the damage of Strun Wraith in PvP.
The Strun has received a PBR update!

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Strun Wraith and Gorgon weapons not showing the correct Impact / Slash / Puncture stats in the Conclave Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes:
Strun’s damage has been increased in PvP.
MK1 Strun’s damage has been  increased in PvP.
Strun Wraith’s damage has been  decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of all Strun and Boar weapons in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Strun and Strun Wraith making continuous clicking sounds when you hit an empty magazine.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where having a status chance greater than 100% on the Boar Prime and Strun Wraith would cause the UI to display “0”

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.7.3
patchlogs.fixes: Changed Strun Wraith Crit Chance from the incorrect  50% to the correct 20%.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.changes: All Shotguns get a boost, effective range increased. Hek is boosted further than Strun and Boar.
